title: Screwdriver Additions
description:
A mod to fix some minor personal gripes I have with the game - no hunger/nausea potions, no bell recipe, etc.
Also adds some minor "sinks" to items like Flint and Amethyst that, in my eyes, don't have nearly enough good uses.
body:
This mod adds a lot of random items, including (but not limited to):
- Flint tools (which are very flimsy but fast.)
- Hunger and Nausea potions
- Crafting Recipe for a Bell
- Rotten Flesh to Leather Smelting recipe
- Decorative Statues
- A 'wand' that toggles rain by draining XP
- Candy that gives you a sugar rush, then a sugar crash.
- Floating Amethyst Lanterns

Planned features
- Chicken nuggets (made from chicken, of course)
- Rotten Potato Plant (Grows Poisonous Potatoes, with a 2% chance to drop regular potatoes)
- An offensive magic wand
